title: Velvet Fox
prompt: Transform the uploaded selfie into a stylish red fox portrait with velvet fur, warm amber eyes, and glossy magazine lighting. Keep the person's identity, face shape, gaze, and expression recognisable. Make it playful, premium, and highly shareable.

title: Storybook Fox
prompt: Reimagine the uploaded selfie as a whimsical storybook fox with soft rust fur, hand-painted textures, and enchanted forest mood. Preserve the person's facial identity so it still feels like them. Keep it charming, funny, and polished.
